Limonium polystachyum, commonly known as Limnetis polystachya, is a plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, and it is reported to have several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The bioactive constituents of Limonium polystachyum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The most common herbal preparations made with Limonium polystachyum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
